title: Pass 3: SCHC Rust tests have unresolved TODOs for compression/decompression vector testing
description: lichen-schc/tests/shared_vectors.rs:97 still comments out actual compress/decompress calls against test/vectors/schc_compression.json. Violates test vectors discipline and interop requirements with C impl in lichen/tests/schc/. Completeness gap vs spec appendix-schc.md. See rust/lichen-schc/src/lib.rs:5 referencing Python.
close_reason: Resolved TODO at lichen-schc/tests/shared_vectors.rs:97 by implementing compress/decompress tests against canonical schc_compression.json vectors (Python reference oracle). Reexported API in lib.rs:24. Followed test vectors discipline (no vectors derived from impl). Performed 3 codereview passes (clippy, fmt, integration test); filed+fixed 1 lint bead (project-LICHEN-tblh); all clean on passes 2-3. Tests pass, 5 vectors validated with roundtrip.
